privileged_info_summary: The environment is seeded with synthetic Redmine data. The target project 'Phoenix E-Commerce Platform' has the system identifier 'phoenix-ecommerce'. The target assignee 'Bob Walker' corresponds to the user login 'bob.walker'. The task instructions explicitly require creating an issue with the subject 'Cart total incorrect after applying coupon code', tracker 'Bug', and priority 'High', which match the expected metadata precisely.
